cta.title: Ready to Start the Transformation?
cta.subtitle: Schedule a personalized 30-minute demo. No credit card required, no commitments.

hero.title2: for the Schools of the Future.
hero.desc: Manage academic, financial, and foundation operations in one integrated ecosystem.

valueProp.title: The Average School Uses Multiple Disconnected Applications.
valueProp.desc: Data fragmentation, overwhelmed teachers, and inefficient, non-transparent finances. This is not a small problem — it is a systemic issue.

impacts.label: Administrative Burden
impacts.desc: Teachers are often burdened with manual admin tasks, reducing focus on teaching activities.

impacts.label: Finance
impacts.desc: Manual recording makes it difficult to monitor cash flow and arrears in real-time.

impacts.label: Decision Making
impacts.desc: Scattered data makes it difficult for foundations to get a complete picture quickly.

f1.title: AI Tutor & Gamification
f1.desc: Personalized student learning materials with adaptive AI. Equipped with Gamification systems (XP, Badges, Leaderboards) so learning feels like playing a game.

f2.title: Deep Learning Module (AI)
f2.desc: Not just standard lesson plans. AI compiles Complete Teaching Modules using Deep Learning approaches (Mindful, Meaningful, Joyful). Documents are 100% accreditation-ready, covering Pancasila Student Profiles to Diagnostic & Formative Assessments.

list.title: Learning Steps (U-A-R)
list.sub: To Understand, To Apply, To Reflect

f3.title: CBT & AI Grading
f3.desc: Modern assessment platform with 8 Interactive Question Variations: Multiple Choice, Essay, Ordering, Hotspot, Matching, Dictation, Memory Game, and Find Word.

f4.title: Multi-Channel Finance
f4.desc: Integrated school payment system. Parents can pay tuition via Indomaret, Alfamart, QRIS, or Bank Virtual Accounts.

f5.title: Anti-Bullying SOS
f5.desc: Create a child-friendly school with a bullying reporting system that is safe, anonymous, and monitored.

f6.title: Classroom Cockpit
f6.desc: Smart classrooms with full integration: Monitor Schedules, E-Learning Assignments, Exams/Grades, Finance, Counseling, up to AI Tutors and SOS Reporting in one dashboard.

f7.title: Foundation Helicopter View
f7.short: Full control of all school units
f7.desc: Executive dashboard for foundations to monitor academic, financial, and operational performance of all school units on one screen.

list.title: Centralized Academic Calendar
list.sub: Monitor TK, SD, SMP, SMA agendas

list.title: Achievement Monitoring
list.sub: Recap of student achievements across units

pricingSection.desc: One platform for all school needs. No hidden fees.

benefits.title: Setup & Configuration
benefits.sub: Our team prepares everything from the start

card.label: Starting from
card.note: *Package details & price simulations are explained during the demo
card.promoTxt: Free setup fee & special price with a 3-year subscription

modules.desc: Complete interconnected modules, working synergistically to advance your school.

advantages.heroDesc: A single digital identity follows students from Kindergarten to High School.

f1.title: Data Driven Decision
f1.desc: Real-time analytics dashboards help the Foundation make data-driven strategic decisions.

f2.title: Custom as Needed
f2.desc: Features and workflows can be tailored to the uniqueness and culture of your school.

f3.title: Supports Latest Curriculum
f3.desc: E-Report Cards for Kurikulum Merdeka, P5, up to Islamic Boarding School curricula.

f4.title: Multi-Platform Access
f4.desc: Easy access from Laptops, Tablets, and Smartphones.

befores: Teachers spend 40% of time on admin
afters: Single ID — one source of truth

whiteLabel.desc: Parents download the app with your schools name, logo, and visual identity. Jetschool is completely invisible.

features.title: Custom Branding
features.desc: Logos, colors, and splash screens are completely yours.

features.title: Push Notification
features.desc: School announcements directly to parents phones.

features.title: Auto Update
features.desc: We handle maintenance and bug fixes, so the school can focus on teaching.

demoModal.title: Schedule a Demo
